Class AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule
All Implemented Interfaces:
BuiltInRule, Rule, HasOrigin, Named, Rule, RuleExecutor<Goal>
Direct Known Subclasses:
AbstractBlockContractRule, AbstractLoopContractRule
public abstract class AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule extends Object implements BuiltInRule

Rule for the application of AuxiliaryContracts.

See Also:
  • AbstractAuxiliaryContractBuiltInRuleApp

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final record 
    AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule.Instantiation
    This encapsulates all information from the rule application that is needed to apply the rule.
    protected static class

    A builder for AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule.Instantiations.
